citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: Computers can learn to classify instances or predict values by being shown labeled examples. If the results on new inputs are unsatisfactory, additional training may be required to improve the accuracy.
